name: Popular Trips
description: Queries published trip nodes and renders a 3-up trip-card grid. Designed to show the most popular or latest adventures with clear visual indicators for staff picks and ratings.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small label shown above the section title (e.g., 'Our most-booked').

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The main title for the popular trips section.

field_schema.label: CTA Link
field_schema.help: The link to the 'all trips' page, shown at the end of the section.

field_schema.label: How many trips
field_schema.help: Maximum number of trip cards to display. We recommend 3 for a clean grid layout.

test_data.heading: Trips travelers can't stop talking about.
